headline: The agent is performing reliably with consistent outputs, but there are occasional latency issues and missing model information.

working.summary: Consistent success status across all traces indicating reliable performance.

broken.summary: Missing model information in several traces, which could affect trace analysis.
Zero latency recorded in some traces, indicating potential logging or processing issues.

changed.summary: Latency has improved in recent traces compared to earlier ones.
